seoTitle: How to Cancel Your ClickUp Subscription
metaDescription: Learn how to downgrade or cancel a paid ClickUp plan through the billing portal so you stop future automatic charges without losing current access.
intro: Cancelling a ClickUp subscription is handled through the billing section of your workspace settings, not a separate support request, and it's only accessible to the workspace owner or an authorized admin. This guide walks through opening the billing portal, downgrading to the Free Forever plan, and confirming when your premium features will actually stop.

steps.heading: Confirm you have admin access
steps.body: Make sure you're logged in as the Workspace Owner or an Authorized Admin, since only those roles can modify billing details.

steps.heading: Open Workspace Settings and Billing
steps.body: Click your profile avatar to open Workspace Settings, then navigate the left sidebar to the Billing tab.

steps.heading: Find the downgrade or cancel option
steps.body: Review your current plan level and scroll down to locate the 'Downgrade or Cancel Plan' link.

steps.heading: Select the Free Forever plan
steps.body: Click through to the plan matrix and choose the Free Forever tier to begin the downgrade process.

steps.heading: Complete the offboarding survey
steps.body: Fill out the brief feedback checklist explaining why you're adjusting your subscription.

steps.heading: Confirm the downgrade
steps.body: Click 'Confirm Downgrade' to stop future automated charges, then check your billing email for the confirmation receipt and your final access date.

faq.question: Will I lose access immediately after cancelling?
faq.answer: No, your premium features typically remain available until the end of your current paid billing cycle.

faq.question: Can I cancel just an add-on like ClickUp Brain instead of my whole plan?
faq.answer: Yes, add-ons and seat licenses are often billed separately and can be cancelled independently from your core subscription plan.

faq.question: What if I was charged after I thought I cancelled?
faq.answer: Check ClickUp's satisfaction guarantee support channels, which can help address unintentional automatic renewals within a set window.

faq.question: Do I need to contact support to cancel?
faq.answer: No, cancellation can be done directly through the Billing tab in Workspace Settings without needing to contact support.
